result.summary: Found 4 issues on this BetRivers Pennsylvania casino page, ranging from a major data display error to minor layout truncation issues typical of horizontal scroll carousels.

issues.description: The 'Cop the Lot' game card displays a negative jackpot value of '-$6,266.13', which is likely a data rendering error. Jackpot values should never display as negative numbers.
issues.suggestion: Investigate the jackpot data feed for this game and ensure the value is correctly calculated and formatted. Add a validation layer to prevent negative monetary values from rendering in the UI.

issues.description: Multiple game card titles on the right edge of the horizontal carousels are visually clipped and unreadable (e.g., 'MAGNI PHO...' and 'MUNC MI...'). While partial cards are expected in carousels, the title text is cropped mid-word making them illegible.
issues.suggestion: Ensure card titles are either fully visible or gracefully truncated with an ellipsis within the card bounds. Consider adjusting card width or font size so critical text is not clipped at the viewport edge.

issues.description: The top navigation tab 'Hot Ga...' is cut off at the right edge of the screen, making the label unreadable.
issues.suggestion: Ensure navigation labels are either fully visible or clearly indicate they are scrollable (e.g., with a fade/gradient or scroll indicator). Avoid mid-word truncation for navigation items.

issues.description: The 'Top Played New Games' section has a third column of game cards that are partially visible and cut off on the right side (e.g., 'HYPERAC...' and 'DARK WATER...'), providing a broken visual experience.
issues.suggestion: Either use a proper carousel with visible scroll controls, or adjust the grid layout to show complete cards. A visible scroll affordance (arrow button or swipe hint) would improve usability.
